---
title: "Hi, I'm Angelina Jao"
---


::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/hs.png){width=100% style="border-radius: 50%;"}
:::
::: {.column width="70%" style="padding-left: 3rem;"}
I'm a Marketing Management student at Cal Poly Pomona who loves the intersection of creativity and analytics. I specialize in transforming complex information into clear, engaging, and actionable insights.
:::
:::

## About Me

I am currently working towards a <span class="highlight">Marketing Management</span> degree from California State Polytechnic University, Pomona.



## Let's Connect

You can [email me](mailto:angelinagjao@gmail.com) or connect on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/angelina-g-jao/).

---

*Welcome to my portfolio.*
